title: United Kingdom First Adult Passport Application
description: Apply for a first UK adult passport using the official HM Passport Office online service. Sibling to the published adult renewal, this document adds the first-time identity evidence a renewal does not need: parents' details to establish British nationality, supporting identity documents (e.g. a birth certificate), and a person who can confirm the applicant's identity. It does not submit the application; the live HM Passport Office source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md). The application fee is intentionally not encoded.

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official GOV.UK 'Apply for your first adult passport' guidance page. Confirmed against the source: eligibility (British national, aged 16+ or within 3 weeks of turning 16, never held a UK passport, or last UK passport issued before 1 January 1994); the £102 online / £115.50 paper fee (intentionally not encoded as data); a digital photo; supporting identity documents; and that a person must confirm the applicant's identity (the online equivalent of a countersignatory). Parents' details are collected to establish British nationality for a first application. Field set mirrors the published gb/hmpo/passport-renewal-adult reference plus first-time evidence; the screen-by-screen field order and labels have not yet been independently captured. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First and middle names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: hasPreviousName
fields.label: Have you ever been known by another name?
fields.description: If yes, the service collects your previous name and when it changed.

fields.name: previousName
fields.label: Previous name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when hasPreviousName is true.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD. You must be 16 or older (or within 3 weeks of turning 16) to use this service.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Date of birth

fields.name: townOfBirth
fields.label: Town or city of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Place of birth

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Place of birth

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. As recorded in the passport.

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Address — building and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Where the passport should be sent.

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Address — second line (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressTown
fields.label: Town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressPostcode
fields.label: Postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A UK postcode in uppercase, e.g. SW1A 1AA. Omit for an overseas address and give the full address in the address lines.

fields.name: addressCountry
fields.label: Country
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code in uppercase, e.g. GB.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used to send application updates.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. International E.164 format, e.g. +447700900000.

fields.name: photoFile
fields.label: Digital photo
fields.description: A digital photo meeting the published passport photo rules. GovSchema references the upload by metadata and never transports the image bytes.

fields.name: birthCertificateFile
fields.label: Birth certificate
fields.description: Identity and nationality evidence for a first passport, e.g. a UK birth certificate (a full certificate showing parents may be required). Provide the document to the live service; GovSchema does not transport the bytes.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Documents you need to send

fields.name: supportingIdentityDocumentsFile
fields.label: Supporting identity documents
fields.description: Additional identity documents the service may request to confirm your identity (e.g. a current photo-card driving licence or, for naturalised citizens, a certificate of registration/naturalisation). Provide originals to the live service as instructed.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Documents you need to send

fields.name: parentFullName
fields.label: Parent's full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A first application collects parents' details to establish British nationality. Give at least one parent's full name.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Your parents' details

fields.name: parentTownOfBirth
fields.label: Parent's town or city of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used to help establish nationality.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Your parents' details

fields.name: parentCountryOfBirth
fields.label: Parent's country of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Your parents' details

fields.name: identityConfirmerName
fields.label: Name of the person confirming your identity
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A first application requires a person who can confirm your identity (the online equivalent of a countersignatory). They must know you and meet the published eligibility rules, and they receive a request to confirm your identity.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Someone to confirm your identity

fields.name: identityConfirmerEmail
fields.label: Email of the person confirming your identity
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The service emails this person a request to confirm your identity online.
fields.sourceRef: First adult passport — Someone to confirm your identity
